examples: Objective to sum up the experience of long-distance aeromedical transport and analyze various factors affecting it.
Conclusion Comprehensive planning and meticulous arrangement are important for emergent long-distance aeromedical transport.
Objective to investigate the disease spectrum resulting in flying disqualification in fighters pilots, so as to provide bases for aeromedical support.
Even better, some NPWT devices can be used during aeromedical transport.
